overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring an urban plaza with modern architecture and a narrow rock canyon. The character walks through an open area with abandoned vehicles and contemporary buildings, pauses to observe a large structure with a vertical advertisement, then proceeds into a narrow passage between massive boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open plaza from left to right, passing a pink concrete office building

entered.detail: multi-story building with pinkish concrete facade and dark windows
large contemporary building with curved glass exterior and geometric design
wrecked cars scattered across the plaza surface
tall green trees lining the edge of the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide open urban plaza with asphalt ground. A pink office building stands on the left while a modern glass building appears in the distance on the right. Abandoned vehicles are scattered across the plaza, and the area is completely empty of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza facing modern commercial building with advertisement

events.description: character turns 180 degrees to face the modern glass building and camera
character stops walking and stands still observing the building and surroundings

agents.ego_description: turned to face the modern glass building, standing still and looking up at the large vertical advertisement banner

entered.detail: tall vertical banner with Red Bull branding and logo mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face the camera and the modern glass building, standing still in the open plaza. The large vertical Red Bull advertisement banner is prominently displayed on the building's facade. The pink office building and abandoned vehicles are now behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between massive rock formations

events.description: character turns and begins walking away from the camera toward the rock canyon entrance
entering the narrow canyon passage between large boulders, leaving the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and into the narrow rock passage, moving deeper into the canyon away from the urban plaza

entered.detail: massive dark boulders forming a narrow canyon entrance
green trees and bushes visible in the distance within the rock passage
the same pink building now visible on the right side as the character circles back

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks away from the plaza toward a narrow passage between massive rock formations. The ground transitions from asphalt to gravel as the character enters the canyon. The pink office building remains visible on the right while the modern glass building disappears from view. The passage narrows significantly as the character proceeds deeper between the towering boulders.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban plaza that gradually transitions into a narrow, towering rock canyon. It begins with the character walking across a wide asphalt expanse scattered with abandoned vehicles, flanked by a pink office building and a distant glass structure. As the character pauses to face the camera, the scene focuses on a large vertical Red Bull advertisement banner prominently displayed on the glass building's facade. The camera then follows the character as they turn away from the plaza, with the ground shifting from asphalt to gravel while the modern glass building disappears from view. Finally, the environment narrows significantly as the character proceeds deeper into a passage between massive boulders, leaving the pink office building behind.
